heading: Cooperation with other Government agencies
label: 411 Cooperation with other Government agencies
text: Executive agencies within the meaning of and the Government Publishing Office are authorized to furnish property, both real and personal, and personal and nonpersonal services to the Postal Service, and the Postal Service is authorized to furnish property and services to them. The furnishing of property and services under this section shall be under such terms and conditions, including reimbursability within the limitations of chapter 37, as the Postal Service and the head of the agency concerned shall deem appropriate.section 105 of title 5
notes: Amendments2022— substituted “including reimbursability within the limitations of chapter 37” for “including reimbursability”.Pub. L. 117–108

Change of Name“Government Publishing Office” substituted for “Government Printing Office” in text on authority of , set out as a note preceding , Public Printing and Documents.section 1301(b) of Pub. L. 113–235section 301 of Title 44
Effective DateSection effective , pursuant to Resolution No. 71–9 of the Board of Governors. See , set out as a note preceding .July 1, 1971section 15(a) of Pub. L. 91–375section 101 of this title
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “including reimbursability within the limitations of chapter 37” for “including reimbursability”.Pub. L. 117–108
